T053.notes: loadMetaFromStorage() / saveMetaToStorage() added to main.ts. Persists oghamsUnlocked (merged with starters), factionRep (clamped 0-100), totalRuns. Storage key: merlin_meta (JSON). load called after loadAnamFromStorage() at init. save called at all 4 run-end points (death_drain, death_effects, cards_limit, victory) alongside saveAnamToStorage().

T052.notes: OghamPanel.showOghamPanel() now iterates all 18 OGHAM_SPECS keys instead of oghamsEquipped only. Locked oghams (not in meta.oghamsUnlocked): opacity:0.35, cursor:not-allowed, status row shows lock emoji + 'rep 50', tooltip shows faction name + 'reputation 50 requise'. On-cooldown oghams: opacity:0.5. Available oghams: full opacity + hover effects. resolveChoice set only after DOM guard passes (bug fix). Skip button given id='ogham-skip-btn' for keyboard shortcut.

T054.notes: document.addEventListener('keydown') added before main() call. Space: clicks first .card-option in #card-overlay when visible. Escape: clicks #ogham-skip-btn if ogham panel open, else clicks first button in #run-summary-overlay. Guards against INPUT/TEXTAREA focus.
